children.heading: Location
children.label: a Location
children.text: The Corporation shall maintain its principal office in the immediate vicinity of Muscle Shoals, Alabama. The Corporation shall be held to be an inhabitant and resident of the northern judicial district of Alabama within the meaning of the laws of the United States relating to the venue of civil suits.

children.heading: Account books
children.label: b Account books
children.text: The Corporation shall at all times maintain complete and accurate books of accounts.

children.heading: Oath of office
children.label: c Oath of office
children.text: Each member of the Board, before entering upon the duties of his office, shall subscribe to an oath (or affirmation) to support the Constitution of the United States and to faithfully and impartially perform the duties imposed upon him by this chapter.
